productDisplayName: Jockey ZONE Men Zone White Brief US18
description: Revel in the comfort of soft fabric with this tanga brief from jockey. The superior soft cotton fabric provides breathable comfort, while the cut offers easy leg movement. The printed label allows abrasion free comfort and the double layered front with a keyhole opening offers maximum support. Crafted from 100% premium combed cotton absorbent fabric New high tech cushioned waistband for a smooth comfortable grip Minimum front coverage and maximum back coverage Double layered fly construction for maximum support and comfort Low rise Fit Wash care Machine wash delicate at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Flat dry in shade
